case_title: FRANK MAUNG VS. RUI CAO LIANG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEES $0) SERVED FEB-02-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, RUI CAO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY BURMESE INTERPRETER--RONNIE LEONG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY MAUNG, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, RUI CAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
